tests.name: graphView/provider/analysis/delegates calls the source workspace-ready callback when it exists
graphView/provider/analysis/delegates falls back to the provided workspace-ready callback when the source callback is missing
graphView/provider/analysis/delegates uses the source stale-analysis callback when it exists
graphView/provider/analysis/delegates falls back to the provided stale-analysis callback when the source callback is missing
graphView/provider/analysis/delegates uses the source abort-error callback when it exists
graphView/provider/analysis/delegates falls back to the provided abort-error callback when the source callback is missing
graphView/provider/analysis/state creates and syncs the analysis request state
graphView/provider/analysis/state exposes analyzer, filter, and disabled plugin state through the accessors
graphView/provider/analysis/state syncs analysis request state from plain state snapshots
graphView/provider/analysis/state syncs execution state updates from plain state snapshots
graphView/provider/analysis/state reflects analyzer initialization progress onto the provider source immediately
graphView/provider/analysis/state clones changed file path arrays through the state accessors
graphView/provider/analysis/state creates and syncs the workspace-ready state
graphView/provider/analysis/state updates raw and transformed graph data on the provider source
graphView/provider/analysis default dependencies returns the analysis lifecycle delegates
graphView/provider/analysis default dependencies reports that a workspace exists when folders are present
graphView/provider/analysis default dependencies reports that no workspace exists when folders are absent
graphView/provider/analysis default dependencies logs analysis errors to the console
graphView/provider/analysis/methods factories builds the expected request and execution handlers for each analysis mode
graphView/provider/analysis/execution executes analysis with delegate-backed handlers and syncs execution state
graphView/provider/analysis/handlers builds execution handlers that update provider state and delegate callbacks
graphView/provider/analysis/handlers builds request handlers that update live request state
graphView/provider/analysis/methods returns analysis helpers without mutating the provider source
graphView/provider/analysis/methods marks workspace readiness with the current registry and syncs the live state back to the source
graphView/provider/analysis/methods passes live wrapper methods into the delegate factory
graphView/provider/analysis/methods checks analysis staleness against the current request id and delegates abort checks
graphView/provider/analysis/methods wires delegate callbacks through executeAnalysis and runAnalysisRequest
graphView/provider/analysis/methods falls back to the delegate wrappers when source-owned analysis methods are unavailable
graphView/provider/analysis/request runs the analysis request flow with delegate-backed abort checks and live request sync
graphView/provider/analysis/request keeps load-mode requests bound to the provided load implementation
